masthead.tagline: The evening edition, assembled without its editor.

lead.headline: Are AI labs pelicanmaxxing?
lead.blurb: Are AI labs pelicanmaxxing? Excellent piece of work by Dylan Castillo, who took a deep-dive into the frequently pondered question of whether the AI labs have been deliberately training models to draw pelicans riding bicycles in response to my deeply unscientific benchmark . I've been randomly spot-checking this in the past by testing models against other animals riding other types of vehicle, but

secondaries.blurb: Anas Sarwar has never made a secret of his desire to hold high office, but where does it leave Scottish Labour?

secondaries.blurb: Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani threw about 30 pitches in a bullpen session prior to Wednesday's game at Philadelphia. There is still no timetable for his return to the mound.

stories.headline: Miami Heat’s LeBron James leak sparks wave of fake signing announcements
stories.blurb: The Miami Heat accidentally scheduled a LeBron James press conference on YouTube, prompting orgs to announce fake signings of their own.

stories.headline: Influencer Miss Tattoo and boyfriend shot dead over alleged debts
stories.blurb: Brazilian goth influencer Ulissias Marcelli, known online as Miss Tattoo, and her boyfriend have been found shot dead on a rural roadside.

stories.headline: Linus Tech Tips says Valve’s Steam Machine is the best desktop PC he’s ever used
stories.blurb: After using it as his primary computer, Linus Tech Tips says the Steam Machine’s biggest strength has nothing to do with gaming.

stories.headline: Lost Pokemon documentary reveals over 100 scrapped Diamond & Pearl designs
stories.blurb: A private Game Freak documentary preserved by Pokemon historian Lewtwo has revealed over 100 early and scrapped designs.

stories.headline: Seahawks' Nick Emmanwori has ankle surgery, expected to play W1
stories.blurb: Seahawks standout safety Nick Emmanwori is expected to miss some time in training camp but be ready by Week 1 following right ankle surgery, sources told ESPN.

stories.headline: Diamondbacks set season high for runs in 15-5 rout of Athletics
stories.blurb: — James McCann hit his 100th major league home run and Ryan Waldschmidt slugged the first of his career as part of Arizona's seven-run fifth inning and the Diamondbacks set a season high for runs scored in a 15-5 rout of the Athletics on Wednesday.

stories.headline: Dobbins throws 6 innings and Wetherholt homers to lead the Cardinals to a 1-0 win over Angels
stories.blurb: — Hunter Dobbins scattered six hits over six innings, JJ Wetherholt hit a home run in the sixth and the St. Louis Cardinals held on for a 1-0 victory over the Los Angeles Angels on Wednesday.

stories.headline: Chiefs unveil renderings of planned $3B domed stadium in Kansas
stories.blurb: The Chiefs unveiled the first renderings for their new stadium in Kansas that is scheduled to open for the NFL's 2031 season.

stories.headline: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
stories.blurb: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.

stories.headline: How news organizations are using AI to advance their vital missions
stories.blurb: News organizations are using AI to strengthen reporting, grow audiences, and improve business operations, with OpenAI tools supporting journalists and publishers worldwide.

stories.headline: Advancing the next era of national science
stories.blurb: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.

stories.headline: Introducing OpenAI Presence
stories.blurb: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.

stories.headline: Accelerating the frontiers of scientific discovery: Google’s $40M commitment to the Genesis Mission

stories.headline: Joshua not ready for death of friends to 'sink in'
stories.blurb: Anthony Joshua says he is not ready for the loss of his two close friends and team members to "sink in yet" as he prepares for his first fight since their death.

stories.headline: Arokodare forces Wolves training to be cancelled
stories.blurb: Wolves striker Tolu Arokodare forces the cancellation of a training session as he refuses to leave the pitch.

stories.headline: Trump threatens to target Iran's bridges and power plants if Hormuz attacks persist
stories.blurb: Donald Trump says the US will respond any time Iranian forces shoot at a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: Menzies taken ill on stage at World Matchplay
stories.blurb: Cameron Menzies needs medical attention after being taken ill during his World Matchplay second-round match against Ross Smith in Blackpool on Wednesday.

stories.headline: Indian police cracked down on 'cockroach' protesters. They went home and made memes about it
stories.blurb: For 'cockroach' protesters, reels and memes became a way of documenting fear, making sense of violence and refusing to let it have the last word.

stories.headline: Former defence minister Al Carns turns down ministerial offer
stories.blurb: Carns quit following the resignation of John Healey as defence secretary in a row over military funding.

stories.headline: A year after deadly jet crash at Bangladesh school, families demand answers
stories.blurb: This week marks one year since a military jet struck a school in Dhaka, killing 36, most of them children.

stories.headline: Where Did This Tik To Sound Come From? IYO Meme Explained
stories.blurb: Iyo, often capitalized as iyo, is a viral TikTok sound and nonsensical slang term originating from a Fortnite voice chat clip featuring various young-sounding players engaging in an increasingly heated exchange of trash talk. The audio includes the line, "If you don't stop talking, I'mma get a little KK to drop a little JJ," followed by one of the players saying, "Iyo," a distinctive pronunciation

stories.headline: Twitter Is Obsessed Over The Look This Girl Gives In A Viral Foam Party Video
stories.blurb: Foam Party Girl or the Goddamnitdonut Look and Bounce Video, also known as the Ann K. Video, is a viral video of a girl at a foam party, purported to be Instagram user goddamnitdonut, aka Ann K., dancing and then giving an unseen person a flirtatious look before she continues dancing. The video went viral in late July 2026 on X / Twitter, inspiring discourse and memes about the look that she gives

stories.headline: Internet Mocks Andrew Tate Arrest Outfit
stories.blurb: Andrew Tate Arrest Outfit, also known as the Andrew Tate Arrest Outfit Meme, refers to a series of memes and jokes mocking the clothing worn by manosphere podcaster and influencer Andrew Tate in photographs taken during his July 2026 arrest in Miami. The images showed Tate wearing a shiny, low-buttoned purple blouse-style shirt, tight cropped black pants and loafers, alongside accessories includin

stories.headline: The 'Marc Cucurella Cat' Meme Becomes One Of The Last Major World Cup Memes
stories.blurb: Marc Cucurella Cat, also known simply as the Cucurella Cat Meme, is a viral video and reaction image of a tabby cat sitting on a windowsill wearing a large black curly wig, resembling Spanish professional footballer and soccer star Marc Cucurella Saseta, who plays for the La Liga club Real Madrid and Spain's men's national team. The original video was posted to TikTok by user welcometolevush in ea

stories.headline: 'Computah' Guy Julius Mondragon Talks About His Favorite Filming Moments
stories.blurb: "Computah" just named his favorite moment from filming so far and it's a good one. Full video is up now, link in our bio. 🔗

stories.headline: Kevin Warsh has homed in on three key phrases. How Fed watchers interpret them
stories.blurb: In five public appearances, Warsh has used the phrase "family fight" 13 times, returning to "first principles" 11 times and "inflation is a choice" for the Fed six times.

stories.headline: Trump plans generic drug tariffs from 2028 with two-year delay testing U.S. onshoring push
stories.blurb: The latest tariff salvo underscored Trump's goal of reshoring low-cost drug production, but displacing established suppliers like India won't be easy.

stories.headline: Save $1,500 Off an Alienware Area-51 Ryzen X3D Gaming PC With RTX 5090 GPU and 64GB of RAM
stories.blurb: Still expensive, but a competitive price point in today's market for an extremely powerful gaming PC.

stories.headline: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra Review So Far
stories.blurb: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra is Samsung's latest flagship foldable, and while it brings the better battery and camera that I've been wanting for years, its $2099 price tag is hard to swallow.

stories.headline: Save $100 Off a Like New Asus ROG Xbox Ally X Handheld Gaming PC at Best Buy
stories.blurb: The most powerful Windows-based gaming handheld.

stories.blurb: A Pokémon Diamond and Pearl documentary has been uploaded in full to YouTube, offering fans a look at how those games were made.

stories.blurb: Preconfigured using Xbox's Design Lab service.

stories.headline: Fallout 3 and New Vegas remasters need to steal Fallout 4's best feature
stories.blurb: The way Fallout 4 treats power armor is far superior to its predecessors, and the upcoming remasters should retrofit the mechanic.

stories.headline: Charli XCX – “If You Take Away The Music, Then What Has She Got?”
stories.blurb: Only two days until Music, Fashion, Film , but Charli XCX isn't done with the rollout. We got the latest single " Camera " on Tuesday (July 21), but she still has B-sides in store. Previous B-sides are " I Keep Thinking About You Every Single Day And Night " and " Playboy Bunny ," and today she's sharing the final B-side, "If You Take Away The Music, Then What Has She Got?," which she debuted in B

stories.headline: Trusselina – “Gastro” & “Trusselina Archimboldi”
stories.blurb: Mikaela Oppenheimer used to be in the Brooklyn emo band Hello Mary, while Hayden McGarvey is a former member of the Philadelphia shoegaze crew Bleary Eyed. The two of them got to know each other when their bands toured together in 2024, and now they've joined forces to form Trusselina, a new duo whose music doesn't sound anything like their previous two bands. The post Trusselina – “Gastro” & “Tru

stories.headline: Wild Pink – “500 Is The New 250”
stories.blurb: Wild Pink's upcoming album Still Coming Down feels a lot like MJ Lenderman cosplay, but can we even be mad about it? It sounds good , and Lenderman himself works on the record, so he must not mind. "500 Is The New 250" — which follows " Round Of Applause At The End Of The World " and " Box Store " — has a man taking a Cybertruck to his favorite bar (poetically called Hard Luck) to bet on his phone
